main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'daño oxidativo irreversible por cloramina breakthrough CAG saturado + ausencia SBS respaldo' literal.

recommended_action.justification: SBS emergencia 3-5 mg/L + ORP <+200 + control redundante — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide Fujiwara elemento líder o índice yodo CAG — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: Fujiwara negativo + único tubo desviado → MECH switch.
